name: density
description: Set up local Density data and render Broadsheet-style answers inline when the CLI supports chart questions.

interface.shortDescription: Set up local Density data and chart when supported.
interface.longDescription: Density helps Codex install or find the Density CLI, verify local Parquet-first storage, prepare customer data through a guided setup flow, check chart capability, and return concise title/subtitle/chart answers when the CLI supports them.
defaultPrompt: Set up Density for local chart questions
Ask Density what rooms are busiest
Show a Density space type breakdown
